artists.name: LUDA G
artists.bio: Born and raised in the streets of Paarl, LUDA G is the cornerstone of GOAT RECORDS. His razor-sharp lyricism, cinematic delivery, and relentless work ethic have made him the face of a new generation of South African rap.
artists.shortBio: The cornerstone of GOAT RECORDS. LUDA G's razor-sharp lyricism and cinematic delivery define the new sound coming out of Paarl. Every verse hits like a statement.

artists.name: DJ-LES
artists.bio: Multi-platinum selling artist with a signature Afro-fusion sound.
artists.shortBio: Multi-platinum selling artist with a signature Afro-fusion sound. 3 albums, 40M+ streams and counting.

artists.name: KAY_MEDUSA
artists.bio: Making history as the first female rapper in SA under the GOAT RECORDS banner. Untouchable flow and groundbreaking energy.
artists.shortBio: Making history as the first female rapper in SA under the GOAT RECORDS banner. Untouchable flow and groundbreaking energy.

artists.name: GEO FLAME
artists.bio: Hailing from Paarl, Geo Flame brings the smoothest R&B and soul to the label. His vocal depth and emotional delivery are unmatched.
artists.shortBio: Hailing from Paarl, Geo Flame brings the smoothest R&B and soul to the label. His vocal depth and emotional delivery are unmatched.

artists.name: YOUNG OG CPT
artists.bio: The perfect blend of raw rap energy and smooth soul. Young brings a unique and versatile sound to the GOAT roster.
artists.shortBio: The perfect blend of raw rap energy and smooth soul. Young brings a unique and versatile sound to the GOAT roster.

artists.name: YOUNG OG
artists.bio: A versatile powerhouse who effortlessly bridges the gap between hard-hitting rap verses and melodic R&B hooks.
artists.shortBio: A versatile powerhouse who effortlessly bridges the gap between hard-hitting rap verses and melodic R&B hooks.

artists.name: BLXCKOUT
artists.bio: Pure Durban energy meeting next-level production. The clubs shut down when BLXCKOUT drops a set.
artists.shortBio: Pure Durban energy meeting next-level production. The clubs shut down when BLXCKOUT drops a set.
